sheet_name: แปลนระบบสุขาภิบาลพื้นชั้นล่าง, แบบขยายระบบสุขาภิบาลห้องน้ำ

elements.description: Ø3/4"CW cold-water supply entering top of detail
Ø4"S soil pipe from water closet

sibling_files: บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า29_floor_plan.json
warnings: This is a small-scale (1:50) schematic detail plan of underfloor bathroom piping, not on the main building grid -- grid_ref_is_free_text_not_grid_notation is correctly true here (unlike the sibling main floor plan on this same page, which IS on the real grid -- see that file's warnings).

Fixture layout (WC, lavatory positions) is only partially legible; pipe-size callouts (Ø3/4"CW, Ø2 1/2"W, Ø4"S, Ø2"FD, Ø2"V+AVC) are read with moderate confidence but exact routing paths between fixtures are not fully traceable at this resolution.
